---
id: get-mixtape
title: "Get mixtape detail"
description: "Returns the detail page for a specific mixtape including its tracklist."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get mixtape detail"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/vibes/mixtapes/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the detail page for a specific mixtape including its tracklist.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
